The '''''Midnight Star''''' was a modified [[YV-545 light freighter]], captained by [[Cala Worner]], and co-piloted by [[Thul Kariss]]. It was registered to the [[Outer Rim Trade Consortium]], and was affiliated with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

It was first seen on the planet [[Kwevron]], where its crew became embroiled in the discovery and partial rescue of a Rebel cell. Its crew transported Rebel operatives to [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] and [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], simultaneous with the escape of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and rescued [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Alku Vordu]] on [[Daroon]]. During the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle of Aargonar (Galactic Civil War)|attack]] on [[Aargonar 3]], it transported [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Hamelin]], [[Cala Worner]] and [[Gruu Dunrik]] to safety.
